name: Sloppy Joes for 100
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, brown the beef, onions, peppers, and celery in batches until meat is browned. Remove with a slotted spoon onto a large roaster.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the Dutch oven. Cover and simmer for 3-4 hours.
3. Serve on hamburger buns. Makes approximately 12 quarts.
